perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a hand holding a smartphone showing an iPhone interface. (2) Cut to a middle-aged male character (3cTim) wearing a flat cap, glasses, and a blue/white striped sports jersey, speaking enthusiastically inside a bright store. (3) A screenshot of a YouTube channel '3cTim哥生活日常' is shown briefly. (4) The scene shifts to a retail shelf showing a Nintendo Switch 2 box, followed by the main character gesturing towards it. (5) A hand is shown scrolling through a travel booking app on a smartphone. (6) The character reappears in front of a 'Taiwan Mobile' store background, using large hand gestures and pointing towards decorative text overlays.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and high-tempo electronic background music starts immediately. A male voice speaks in an energetic, high-pitched tone, sounding like a sales pitch or announcement. (2) Periodic 'ping' and 'whoosh' sound effects (SFX) occur during scene transitions and when text appears. (3) The male voice remains continuous and fast-paced, maintaining an excited and persuasive tone throughout the video. (4) The music remains consistent in volume, balancing with the clear, studio-quality vocal track.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Hook: '聽說今年 iPhone 17 會更貴耶!!' (I heard iPhone 17 will be even more expensive this year!!). (2) Functional: '先來看我們' (Look at us first) and channel name '3cTim哥生活日常'. (3) Decorative: 'iPhone 17 全系列 直接抽!!' (Full iPhone 17 series giveaway!!) in bold colors. (4) Decorative: 'Switch 2~' and '參加我們9月蘋果發表會直播' (Join our September Apple event livestream). (5) Decorative: '星宇航空 來回機票!!' (Starlux Airlines round-trip tickets!!) and '總價值超過40萬' (Total value over 400,000).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Problem Hook -> Solution Introduction (Giveaway) -> Prize Showcase -> Final Call to Action

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 male staff, and 1 female staff visible behind the counter in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged Asian male, wearing a grey flat cap, glasses, a blue and white striped jersey with 'ROOTS 1973' on it, and a wooden beaded bracelet.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An electronics retail store with orange and white walls, bright LED panel lights, and displays for Taiwan Mobile (台灣大哥大) and Google.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Incentive Showcase -> Urgency -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the creator's upcoming YouTube livestream for the Apple event by showcasing a massive giveaway including iPhones, Switch consoles, and flight tickets to drive viewer engagement and channel subscriptions.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator explicitly mentions prizes and points to the store brand 'Taiwan Mobile' and airlines 'Starlux'.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced editing with vibrant text overlays and the signature energetic greeting of 3cTim.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-reward strategy (giveaways) to convert short-form video viewers into long-form livestream audiences.
